title: Top ePub Reading Apps for iPad
first_prompt: What are the leading ePub reading apps on the iPad?
summary: Irwin was trying to identify the most typographically beautiful and well-designed applications available for reading ePub documents on the iPad. The conversation began with a general query about leading ePub apps, but the assistant initially provided suggestions that were either too broad or focused on writing tools, such as iA Writer. After Irwin corrected the assistant, the AI acknowledged the error and attempted a final, specific search to narrow the focus to dedicated ePub reading apps.
